text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
TAF Claims RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 235 

RX_FILL_DT 

LABEL: Prescription Fill Date 

DESCRIPTION: Date the drug, device, or supply was dispensed by the provider. 

SHORT NAME: RX_FILL_DT 

LONG NAME: RX_FILL_DT 

TYPE: DATE 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE: T-MSIS Analytic File (TAF) claims 

FILE(S): RX header 
RX line 

VALUES: Date (numeric, system dependent) 
Null/missing = Source value is missing or unknown 

COMMENT: CCW copies
